caption: A man with a beard wears a black baseball cap with a gold emblem, a black t-shirt that reads "CHECK IT", and over-ear headphones. He is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a silver microphone. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring gold stars and the text "HUSTLE" repeated. To his right, a red and black logo reads "ROSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "PODCAST" and a logo on the right that reads "ROSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hands while speaking. In the first frame, his right arm is extended outward. By the second frame, his hand has moved closer to his chest. In the third frame, he leans slightly forward with his hands clasped near his lap, and by the final frame, he is gesturing with his right hand again.
